overall.description: Game engine footage from a driving simulator showing a military-style vehicle driving through a coastal town with traditional stone architecture, transitioning from urban residential streets to open coastal roads with autumn foliage and waterfront views.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with stone row houses

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through residential area in a military vehicle, maintaining left-side road position

entered.detail: traditional European stone terrace houses with chimneys lining the right side of the street
black metal fence running along left side of road
glass and metal bus shelter with advertising poster
tall modern street lamps lining both sides of the road
circular 30 mph speed limit sign on left side

segments.scene_description: Driving through a quiet urban residential street with traditional stone row houses on the right and a metal fence on the left. The road features bus stops and street lamps under an overcast autumn sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal transition road with autumn trees and waterfront views

events.description: road opens up to reveal waterfront and beach area on the left side
passing a dark sedan traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: navigating gentle curves along the coastal road, passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving in the opposite direction, passing by on the right

entered.detail: trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage lining the left side of the road
coastal water and beach visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from enclosed residential streets to a more open coastal road with views of the water on the left. Autumn-colored trees line the route as the vehicle passes a dark sedan traveling in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal road with mixed residential and commercial traffic

events.description: overtaking a large commercial truck with 'SUPER MARKET' signage

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the coastal road, overtaking a slow-moving commercial truck

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck with 'SUPER MARKET' text on the side, traveling in same direction

entered.detail: sandy beach and shoreline becoming visible along the left side
low stone wall running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the coastal road, the vehicle overtakes a large supermarket truck. The beach becomes visible on the left while stone walls and autumn trees line the route, with residential buildings giving way to more open coastal scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal highway with beach and ocean views

events.description: leaving urban area behind, entering open coastal highway with expansive ocean views

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open coastal road with clear views of the beach and ocean on the left

entered.detail: sandy beach directly adjacent to the road on the left side
expansive stretch of road extending toward the horizon with coastal scenery
open ocean water visible beyond the beach

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide-open coastal highway leaving the town behind. Sandy beaches and ocean views dominate the left side while stone walls line the road, creating a scenic rural coastal drive under overcast skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined urban residential street into an open coastal road. It begins by navigating a quiet neighborhood lined with traditional stone row houses and a metal fence under an overcast autumn sky. As the vehicle moves forward past street lamps and bus stops, the enclosed architecture gradually gives way to a more expansive landscape. The scene then opens up to reveal views of the water on the left, with the gray urban tones shifting toward the vibrant colors of autumn trees lining the route. Finally, the camera passes a dark sedan traveling in the opposite direction as the road fully expands into a scenic coastal drive.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a residential coastal road into a wide-open rural highway. It begins by overtaking a large supermarket truck along a route lined with stone walls and autumn trees, where residential buildings gradually give way to the first glimpses of the beach on the left. As the vehicle pushes forward, the town recedes and the scenery expands into a scenic coastal drive. The environment then shifts to a wide-open highway dominated by sandy beaches and ocean views under overcast skies, with the stone walls continuing to frame the road as it leaves the urban area behind.
